name: Maryland for Bernie
subject: Will you join us for Bernie Camp next Saturday?
body:
#
Dear Bernie Supporter,
How do we win Maryland? We win when we have the best prepared movement, trained by our local organizers, to help us turn out our supporters on Election Day. That's why **we are holding a statewide day of trainingnext Saturday affectionately called Bernie Camp**.
Bernie Camp will be a day-long training where we will listen to you and your ideas while we create a strong, winning team in our region. We'll all be trained on the best ways to talk to our neighbors about our movement, recruit volunteers and create local teams.
**Will you join us at the Bernie Camp near you?**
**[Bernie Camp: Rockville](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/detail/442jf)
Saturday, April 9th in Rockville**
**[RSVP to Attend»](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/detail/442jf)**
**[Click here to see all of the events coming up near you»](http://map.berniesanders.com/#zipcode=20902&distance=20&sort=time&f%5B%5D=official-event&f%5B%5D=phonebank&f%5B%5D=register-voters&f%5B%5D=barnstorm "http://map.berniesanders.com/#zipcode=20902&distance=20&sort=time&f%5B%5D=official-event&f%5B%5D=phonebank&f%5B%5D=register-voters&f%5B%5D=barnstorm")**
Most importantly, we'll be building strong relationships with all the supporters engaged in our community who are working hard to get us to a victory on April 26th. Joining us for Bernie Camp is one of the most important ways you can help our movement win.
We look forward to seeing you at Bernie Camp on April 9th!
In solidarity,
Maryland for Bernie

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

In solidarity, Maryland for Bernie Paid for by Bernie 2016 PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE

name: Russ Feingold
subject: Flabbergasted
disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
body:
Nobody should doubt the power of this grassroots campaign. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4232/1c469400/5e10e96/351dd35/3948962044/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-def?utm_source=ema_2016-04-02_MAR-EOQ_nd&refcode=ema_2016-04-02_MAR-EOQ_nd&utm_campaign=MAR-EOQ&utm_medium=ema") Friend, I'm flabbergasted. A little over a week ago, we set a really big goal of raising $100,000 online. And, dollar by dollar, we met that goal -- _**and then, we exceeded it.**_ Every single dollar raised toward our end-of-quarter fundraising goal will help us stay ahead in this tough, close race. Because of your support, we'll be able to fight back against Senator Johnson's special interest support, his super PACs, and their inevitable onslaught of attacks against our campaign. Believe me -- they're coming. As Senator Johnson continues to reach toward more divisive, Trump-style rhetoric, we remain a united, people-powered campaign -- **because of you.** We still have months to go before November, but I couldn't be more confident in the strength of our grassroots team. I'll always be in your corner. Thanks for being in mine. Russ

\------
_If you're with Russ, consider making a**[contribution](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4232/1c469400/5e10e96/351dd35/3948962044/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-def?utm_source=ema_2016-04-02_MAR-EOQ_nd&refcode=ema_2016-04-02_MAR-EOQ_nd&utm_campaign=MAR-EOQ&utm_medium=ema")** to the campaign._
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you would like to make a contribution to Russ for Wisconsin, [click here.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4232/1c469400/5e10e96/351dd32/3948962044/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-def?utm_source=ema_2016-01-14_fr-footer-contribute&refcode=ema_2016-01-14_fr-footer-contribute&utm_campaign=advocacy-footer-contribute&utm_medium=ema") If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4232/1c469400/5e10e96/351dd33/3948962044/VEsC/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/fr-optput"). If you would like to change your email or salutation, [click here](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4232/1c469400/5e10e96/351dd30/3948962044/VEsD/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/changeinfo"). [Click here to unsubscribe](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4232/1c469400/5e10e96/351dd31/3948962044/VEsA/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/unsubscribe"). Contributions or gifts to Russ for Wisconsin are not tax deductible. | Authorized and paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer

name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: Add your name to stand with Hillary on women’s rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by more than one million grassroots donors
body:
Not this time, Trump. | Friend --

Donald Trump said this week that he believes women who seek illegal abortions need “some form of punishment” -- as if being denied the right to make our own decisions about our bodies wouldn't be punishment enough.

John Kasich and Ted Cruz were quick to condemn Trump’s remarks -- apparently ignoring that they’ve spent their careers eviscerating women’s health care, causing pain and devastation to who knows how many women.

Bernie Sanders said Trump’s comments were a distraction from “serious issues” -- as if the notion of a president making our most personal decisions for us weren’t a serious issue.

I am so sick of politicians dismissing women and the issues that matter to us.

Not this time.

**Hillary has spent her entire career fighting to advance women’s rights at home and around the world. Today, we’re going to add our names to stand with her, to say enough is enough, and to show Trump, Cruz, and Kasich exactly who they’re up against -- the biggest, strongest team in this election:** [ | | [**Add my name**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjUxMzcyMTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgwMzA0NjgxS0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjUxMzcyMTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgwMzA0NjgxS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Christina

Christina Reynolds
Deputy Communications Director
Hillary for America

**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 to join more than one million grassroots donors standing with her:**

| [ | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjUxMzcyMTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgwMzA0NjgxS0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjUxMzcyMTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgwMzA0NjgxS0&mt=1&rt=0)

| Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by more than one million grassroots donors.
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjUxMzcyMTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgwMzA0NjgxS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjUxMzcyMTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgwMzA0NjgxS0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjUxMzcyMTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgwMzA0NjgxS0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjUxMzcyMTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgwMzA0NjgxS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjUxMzcyMTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgwMzA0NjgxS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjUxMzcyMTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgwMzA0NjgxS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjUxMzcyMTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgwMzA0NjgxS0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjUxMzcyMTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgwMzA0NjgxS0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjUxMzcyMTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgwMzA0NjgxS0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjUxMzcyMTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgwMzA0NjgxS0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: BernieSanders.com
subject: Everybody loves George Clooney
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
If you were wondering how the political and financial establishment of this country would respond to us winning six of seven contests, most of them by extraordinary margins, here's your answer:
**Over the next 15 days alone, Hillary Clinton 's campaign has scheduled 33 high-dollar fundraisers.** While Bernie is campaigning in Wisconsin and New York, the Clinton campaign is traveling to places that have already voted like Colorado, Virginia, and Florida to collect massive checks, including one event where couples can contribute $353,000 to sit with George Clooney.
Now, there's nothing wrong with George Clooney. Everybody loves George Clooney. We'll even plug his new movie, "Money Monster" that appears to be about the destruction caused by the greed, recklessness, and fraud on Wall Street.
But that $353,000 is an outrageous sum of money. **And one of the great questions of this campaign is whether people coming together can overcome the electoral influence of a small number of millionaires and billionaires who are buying our elections.**
That is why as we near the Wisconsin primary, we have to ask:
[**Can Bernie count on you to contribute $3 to our campaign to help us win in Wisconsin and as a way of saying you have had ENOUGH of millionaires and billionaires buying elections? You can do that here.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/before-the-wisconsin-primary?refcode=em160402-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/before-the-wisconsin-primary?refcode=em160402-full")
The next three weeks are likely the most important of the campaign. Wisconsin votes, New York votes, Wyoming caucuses, and a handful of large and important states make their choice on April 26th.
The political and financial establishment of this country are hoping that we've run out of gas. And that's because they know that if we continue to stand together, we have a very good chance to win this Democratic primary.
[**That 's why your $3 contribution to our campaign is so important.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/before-the-wisconsin-primary?refcode=em160402-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/before-the-wisconsin-primary?refcode=em160402-full")
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/before-the-wisconsin-primary?refcode=em160402-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/before-the-wisconsin-primary?refcode=em160402-full")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").
